description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows on some sides allowing natural light into the interior spaces. The house sits on a green lawn base, suggesting a suburban or urban residential setting. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with a prominent large window on one side and smaller, narrow windows on others. The entryway is simple, featuring a plain door without decorative elements, steps, or a porch. The interior layout is partially visible, showing distinct rooms with modern furnishings and open spaces.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a minimalist entryway, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: This view shows the main facade with a large window, several smaller windows, and the main entry door, along with a glimpse of the interior layout.
description_view_1: This side view highlights a large window and the internal room arrangement, with fewer exterior features visible.
description_view_2: This view displays a long, mostly solid wall with minimal window openings, emphasizing the house's rectangular shape.
description_view_3: This rear view shows three small windows and a plain wall, with the entry door and some interior details visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and narrow windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with no porch, steps, or decorative elements
